prediction.pre_match_note: Monza Italian GP — POWER CIRCUIT. qualifying_delta ×0.85 (race pace matters more than qualifying at Monza). Pole position predicted winner. But Monza overtaking possible — pole not as definitive as Monaco. SMS 74 reflects reduced qualifying confidence.

outcome.final_score: Pole sitter won Italian GP from lights to flag

calibration_flags.notes: Monza power circuit — qualifying_delta ×0.85 applied correctly (less definitive than Monaco). Despite de-emphasis, pole still won. This validates: at power circuits, qualifying is a weaker but still valid signal. Not zero weight — just reduced. Fourth qualifying_delta record.
